prestazioni: Engine swap to the Nissan TD27Ti (TD27 engine code) with a BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring a Burns Stainless 4-2-1 merge collector, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise turbo management
Upgraded fuel system with Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, and a custom ECU remap via Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with flex-fuel compatibility for E85 blends

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (specifically valved for the Terrano's R20 chassis), Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part numbers SPF0115K and SPF1116K for front/rear control arms), and a custom-fabricated 3-link rear suspension setup with rose-jointed adjustable trailing arms
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny/Pandem Terrano-specific overfenders (R20 chassis kit), paired with a carbon fiber hood from Seibon with a functional heat extractor vent
Front bumper replacement with a custom 3D-printed aggressive off-road bumper featuring integrated Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods and a Warn Zeon 12-S winch with synthetic rope

Rear exterior upgrades including a custom fabricated aluminum roof rack with integrated RotopaX fuel/water can mounts, a carbon fiber rear spoiler from APR Performance (model CS-R20), and a full de-chrome treatment with vinyl wrap in 3M Matte Military Green (color code 3435-30)
